summary: The user is an elf who lives in a hidden elf community and enjoys dancing and singing on a flat rock near a waterfall. They are unknowingly the object of obsession for Ezekiel, an elf who secretly stalks them. During a festival, they meet Ezekiel and casually ask about his hobbies, to which he calmly admits to stalking, but the user remains unaware of his possessive nature.
